title: query_rules.delete_rule

ruleset_id.description: The unique identifier of the query ruleset containing the rule to delete

rule_id.description: The unique identifier of the query rule within the specified ruleset to delete

description:
Delete a query rule.

Delete a query rule within a query ruleset.
This is a destructive action that is only recoverable by re-adding the same rule with the create or update query rule API.
